headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -77.0)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 89% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 153 quotes and an overwhelming 128 at strong intensity, meaning people are venting hard and those strong quotes are significantly boosting the score.
• Frustrations sit in the upper half of their 158-day range, while Optimism remains near its historical floor and Fears have dropped sharply to the quieter end of theirs.
• Frustrations are nearly unchanged from yesterday, while Fears fell notably (from -9.7 to -36.5), suggesting anxiety has quieted even as general venting stays elevated.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
